sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
I've tried clicking on the green bar at all 4 positions, and it didn't work. I've also tried clicking on the charcoal shape at all 4 positions, and it didn't work. I've tried clicking on almost everything else.
Let me think about this differently. Maybe the goal in Level 2 is to click on the UPPER blue blocks (rows 16-19 or 24-27), not the lower blue blocks. I already tried clicking on the upper blue blocks, and they didn't do anything. But maybe they only work when the green bar is at a specific position.
Let me try clicking on the upper blue blocks when the green bar is at different positions.
Actually, wait. Let me look at the current image more carefully. The image shows the green bar at cols 4-5 (min LEFT), and the charcoal shape to the right of it. The green bar is a small green rectangle, and the charcoal shape is a small dark object.
Looking at the image, I notice that the green bar is at the bottom-left, and the charcoal shape is to the right of it. The green segment is at the middle of the black bar.
Wait, I just noticed something. In the current image, the green bar is at cols 4-5, and the charcoal shape is at cols 6-9. But the green segment is at cols 28-29. So the green bar and green segment are at different positions.
Maybe the goal in Level 2 is to shift the green bar to align with the green segment (cols 28-29). But the green bar can only be at cols 4-5, 8-9, 12-13, or 16-17. None of these positions align with the green segment at cols 28-29.
Wait, maybe the green bar can be shifted further right. Let me check if clicking the RIGHT blue block when the green bar is at cols 16-17 shifts it further right.
Actually, I already tried this, and the green bar stays at cols 16-17 when I click the RIGHT blue block. So the green bar can only be at 4 positions: cols 4-5, 8-9, 12-13, or 16-17.
Hmm, let me think about this differently. Maybe the goal in Level 2 is to shift the green bar to a specific position and then click on the UPPER blue block. Let me try this.
Actually, let me try clicking on the upper blue blocks at each of the 4 green bar positions.
